title: Songs of Conquest Mobile App Store Page

recommendedUse: Android availability, Google Play store framing, mobile-facing description, update metadata, and store category context.
blockedUse: Do not use reviews as production facts, sentiment proof, or community consensus.

title: Songs of Conquest Official Website
recommendedUse: Official identity, genre framing, Wielders, armies, adventure strategy, empire building, and broad feature language.
blockedUse: Do not use official art, screenshots, press images, or PC-only assumptions without separate clearance.

title: Songs of Conquest Steam Store Page
recommendedUse: PC baseline context for broad genre, developer/publisher identity, and desktop feature comparison.
blockedUse: Do not convert PC multiplayer, workshop, DLC, control, or balance details into mobile facts.

title: Lavapotion Official Website
recommendedUse: Developer identity and high-level official context.
blockedUse: Do not use for mechanics or mobile-specific guide conclusions.

title: Songs of Conquest Community Database
recommendedUse: Cross-check buildings, factions, units, skills, spells, Wielders, artifacts, and reference names.
blockedUse: Do not publish exact mobile values, rankings, or solved builds without mobile verification.

title: Songs of Conquest Wiki: The Essence
recommendedUse: Essence vocabulary, spell-resource framing, and beginner spellcasting explanation.
blockedUse: Do not publish exact spell-path rankings or strongest magic builds.

title: Songs of Conquest Wiki: Wielders
recommendedUse: Wielder role vocabulary, map-army-spell relationship framing, and role-based beginner guidance.

title: Songs of Conquest Wiki: Resources
recommendedUse: Resource names, broad resource pressure, and town-building planning vocabulary.

title: Songs of Conquest Wiki: Factions

title: Songs of Conquest Official Changelogs
recommendedUse: Official version-history context and PC/mobile comparison checks.

title: Mobile Review And Store Feedback Pool
